title: Different Doors
description: A set of versatile doors, perfect for any build style.
body:
--- A set of versatile doors to add more functional options. ### Current Features **Double Doors**
3x3 multi-block doors. Mix and match any wooden door style with any wood type to find the perfect match for your build. Also featuring iron and copper variants. Each door features two open/close styles: a modern slide or a classic swing. - Large 3x3 double doors - 121 Wooden variants - 5 Metal variants (+Waxed Copper) - Two open/close styles: **slide** and **swing**. - Shift-Right click with a Pickaxe to change - Both styles can be crafted - A redstone signal can be used to open/close - Iron doors can only be opened with redstone - Can be waterlogged
Door Styles As each style is available in every wood type, each style has been given a name;
Oak => Twelve Lite
Spruce => Fortified
Birch => Half Paper
Jungle => Half Moon
Acacia => Slatted
Dark Oak => Six Panel
Mangrove => Elegant
Cherry => Half Grated
Bamboo => Half Window
Crimson => Rustic
Warped => Vined
Recipes

Slide

Swing
